# Atlanta Tech Meetup (ATM)

> Atlanta Tech Meetup is Atlanta's largest free monthly tech meetup. 500+ engineers, founders, and builders gather every first Tuesday at Atlanta Tech Park in Peachtree Corners, Georgia for real conversations about AI, software engineering, and cloud architecture. Free to attend, open to everyone.

## What is Atlanta Tech Meetup?
Atlanta Tech Meetup (also known as ATM or the Atlanta Technology Meetup Group) is a community of 500+ engineers, startup founders, and technology builders in the Atlanta, Georgia metro area. The group meets monthly for hands-on sessions, talks, and networking focused on what is actually working in production.

The vibe is warm and humanized. No pitch decks, no fluff. Just people who build, learning from each other.

## Key Facts
- Name: Atlanta Tech Meetup (ATM)
- Also known as: Atlanta Technology Meetup Group, ATMG
- Location: Atlanta Tech Park, Peachtree Corners, GA (Atlanta metro area)
- Schedule: Every first Tuesday of the month
- Time: Typically 6:00 to 8:00 PM Eastern
- Cost: Free and open to everyone
- Community size: 500+ members
- Events hosted: 50+
- Founded: 2024
- Founder: Andrew Schillinger
- Co-Founder: A.D. Slaton
- Design partner: Range of View Studios (https://www.rovstudios.com/)

## Who runs it
- Andrew Schillinger, Founder. Started ATM because Atlanta deserved a tech community built on real conversations, not pitch decks.
- A.D. Slaton, Co-Founder. Engineer and community connector who makes every attendee feel like they already belong.

## Upcoming Event
- Title: ATMG: AI Build Cohort Kickoff
- Date: Wednesday, April 8, 2026
- Time: 6:00 to 8:00 PM EDT
- Format: Part hackathon, part workshop, part real product building. Attendees build with AI alongside other Atlanta technologists using Claude and modern AI workflows to ship open-source projects together.
- Cost: Free
- RSVP: https://www.meetup.com/atl-technology-meetup-group/events/313986477/

## Topics Covered
- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- AI product building, agents, and LLM workflows
- Software Engineering and Architecture
- Cloud Architecture and DevOps
- Modern web development (React, TypeScript)
- Open Source and Community Building
- Startups and founder stories

## How to attend
1. Visit the Meetup group page: https://www.meetup.com/atl-technology-meetup-group/
2. Join the group (free).
3. RSVP to the upcoming event.
4. Show up at Atlanta Tech Park in Peachtree Corners, GA on the first Tuesday of the month.
